decision: Proceed with implementation after dependency gate check
reason: RD-004 depends only on RD-003, and RD-003 is DONE; no cross-epic blockers declared
impact: Work can start without blocked state

decision: Use Django admin computed analytics fields instead of schema changes
reason: RD-004 requires operational visibility in admin UI, not persistence model changes
impact: Fast delivery with low migration risk and immediate diagnostics value

decision: Add list/search/filter/select_related and card diagnostics for installations
reason: DoD requires list visibility and card-level analytics for troubleshooting
impact: Operators can quickly find installations and inspect auth/installation health

decision: Use /api/admin/ as canonical Django admin URL on VPS
reason: Public /admin/* path is served by Nuxt frontend and causes perceived white screen
impact: Operator access path is now deterministic and matches backend routing

decision: Work around JSONField conversion issue for status_code in admin
reason: Legacy table + runtime adapter returned dict and caused 500 in changelist
impact: Installations list is stable in production admin

decision: Normalize installation age calculation for naive datetimes
reason: Change page failed with naive/aware subtraction TypeError
impact: Installation card analytics now render without runtime errors

reason: Django 5.2 no longer exposes django.utils.timezone.utc, causing 500 in Bitrix24Account changelist
impact: Bitrix24Account admin list now opens and renders token expiry analytics

decision: Close RD-004 and complete EPIC-FND after UAT confirmation
reason: User confirmed admin UX works in production and requested formal closure
impact: Roadmap status moved to DONE, Bitrix kanban synced, EPIC-FND completion synchronized
